ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL link to the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viral strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the strain */,
  "strain_details" TEXT /* Specific details or metadata about the strain */,
  "virus_type" TEXT /* Type of virus (e.g., measles, influenza) */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host organism of the virus (e.g., human, animal) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the strain was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_strains" (
  "pub_strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the publication-strain relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain studied in the publication */,
  "strain_role" TEXT /* Role of the strain in the publication (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_strains_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_strains_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citing publication */,
  "cited_pub_title" TEXT /* Title of the cited publication */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., journal article, book chapter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., academic, government) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_affiliations" (
  "author_affil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author-affiliation relationship */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliation */,
  "affiliation_date" TEXT /* Date the author joined the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_affil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_affiliations_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_affiliations_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the publication */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was downloaded */,
  "download_type" TEXT /* Type of download (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
